name: WYNN RESORTS LTD
summary: Wynn Resorts, Limited is a designer, developer, and operator of luxury integrated resorts featuring hotel rooms, gaming, dining, retail, and entertainment. It operates Wynn Palace and Wynn Macau in Macau, Wynn Las Vegas and Encore at Wynn Las Vegas in Nevada, and Encore Boston Harbor in Massachusetts. The company holds a 40% equity interest in a UAE resort under development.

products.name: Wynn Palace
products.description: Luxury integrated resort on Macau's Cotai Strip with casino, hotel, dining, retail, and entertainment.

products.name: Wynn Macau
products.description: Luxury integrated resort in downtown Macau with casino, two hotel towers, dining, and retail.

products.name: Wynn Las Vegas
products.description: Luxury integrated resort on the Las Vegas Strip with casino, hotel towers, dining, retail, and entertainment.

products.name: Encore at Wynn Las Vegas
products.description: Expansion of Wynn Las Vegas offering additional hotel, casino, and amenity offerings.

products.name: Encore Boston Harbor
products.description: Luxury integrated resort in Everett, Massachusetts with casino, hotel, dining, and convention space.

products.name: Wynn Al Marjan Island
products.description: Integrated resort under construction in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE, expected to open in 2027.

partnerships.description: 40% equity interest in unconsolidated affiliate constructing Wynn Al Marjan Island in UAE.
Joint announcement for development and management of Wynn Al Marjan Island in Ras Al Khaimah, UAE.
